subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Jigarwala No. 1
subTitle: The story revolves around Robin Hood, son of Kalyan, who unlike his father prefers comfort to kick. When Robin comes to India to start a hospital, he meets Chaitra and falls in love with her. He follows her to her village in Bihar to find his kick.
